title: RUSTSEC-2024-0384: instant crate unmaintained (transitive via notify)
description: The instant crate v0.1.13 is unmaintained. It's a transitive dependency via notify→notify-types→instant. No security vulnerability, just maintenance risk. Mitigation: monitor for notify crate update that removes this dependency.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
